things.name: Museo del Prado
things.description: Spain's national art museum — one of the world's finest with Velazquez, Goya and El Greco

things.name: Royal Palace of Madrid
things.description: Europe's largest royal palace with 3,418 rooms, the official residence of the Spanish royal family

things.name: Museo Reina Sofia
things.description: Spain's national museum of 20th-century art, home to Picasso's Guernica

things.name: Retiro Park
things.description: Magnificent 350-acre royal park with the Crystal Palace, rowing lake and Sunday concerts

things.name: Puerta del Sol
things.description: Madrid's central square — the heart of the city and Km 0 of all Spanish roads

things.name: Mercado de San Miguel
things.description: Elegant 1916 iron-and-glass market with gourmet tapas, fresh produce and Spanish wines

things.name: Santiago Bernabeu Stadium
things.description: Real Madrid's iconic stadium — recently refurbished with a retractable roof and world-class tour

things.name: Toledo Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage medieval city 75 km south — the City of Three Cultures with stunning cathedral

things.name: Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum
things.description: Outstanding private art collection spanning 700 years from medieval to Pop Art

things.name: Gran Via
things.description: Madrid's Broadway — a grand early-20th-century boulevard of theatres, cinemas and architecture
